description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style candelabrum made of aged brass or bronze, featuring five candle holders arranged symmetrically on elegantly curved arms. The central stem is robust and decorated with classic baluster shapes, leading to a wide, round base that provides stability. Each arm branches out gracefully from the central column, supporting a circular drip plate beneath each candle holder. The surface has a slightly tarnished, antique finish, giving it a sense of historical character and patina. The overall design is both decorative and functional, suitable for holding multiple candles in a formal or ceremonial setting. The object exudes a sense of old-world charm and would be a striking centerpiece in urban public spaces, parks, or upscale outdoor dining areas.
description: A vintage brass candelabrum with five candle holders, ornate curved arms, and a wide, round base. Its antique finish and elegant design make it a decorative centerpiece.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all five candle holders and the symmetrical, ornate arms branching from the central stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the arms and the alignment of the candle holders, with the base and stem profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the full arrangement of arms and holders with the decorative central support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the linear arrangement of the holders and the profile of the base and stem.
